rule: OT-7 (lexr5): round-level disjointness by construction. The 64-term residue partitioned into three disjoint territories, one per proposer; a lever's entries may target ONLY its own territory's ids (an entry outside it is invalid regardless of gate result), and its held-out draw comes from the same territory. Six C-series bundle terms are KEYSTONE-RESERVED pending the operator's naming convention (CORPUS_COVERAGE_PLAN.md Phase 1.4) and are not lever food. Partition drawn 2026-07-12 from node tools/coverage.mjs uncovered ids.

formula-numeric.note: quantitative and geometric terms, expressible since the 2026-07-12 numeric layer (CR-22): number/account defs, initially-literals, comparative defined-as; NO percent literals

zero-party-story.note: cosmological and story-canon terms whose sections often name no actor: the universal cast rule applies (no named actor means the First Person is the holder; NEVER invent other roles, K-2/T-105 precedent)

cast-and-infrastructure.note: named cast, tokens, registries, and technical infrastructure terms; T-146 (Understanding-as-Key) returns as ordinary food after its lexr4 refusal was about ONE lever's pre-answered recipe, not the term
